name: Inline Help Content
summary: Add contextual help text to a form control using `options.help`
whenToUse: Providing guidance on how to fill in a specific field
Clarifying expected input format or source of information
Reducing user errors on fields that may be ambiguous

options.help: Please enter your first name as it appears on your official documents.

notes: Keep help text concise and actionable
Use plain language — aim for grade 9 reading level
Help text appears below the input field
